dialog_steps.body_text_raw:
You show promise, <character name>. Unfortunately, I have some...other business I must attend to at the moment. You should return to the monastery and meet with Master Togo in Linnok Courtyard just off of the main monastery proper.
Use your map to travel there quickly.
dialog_steps.body_text_norm: you show promise, . unfortunately, i have some...other business i must attend to at the moment. you should return to the monastery and meet with master togo in linnok courtyard just off of the main monastery proper. use your map to travel there quickly.

choices.choice_text_raw: I'm on my way.
choices.choice_text_norm: i'm on my way.

choices.choice_text_raw: I need to rest, first.
choices.choice_text_norm: i need to rest, first.

choices.choice_text_raw: You are ready to become an Assassin, <character name>. Use your map to return to the monastery. Master Togo awaits you in Linnok Courtyard.
choices.choice_text_norm: you are ready to become an assassin, . use your map to return to the monastery. master togo awaits you in linnok courtyard.

sources.evidence_quote: You show promise, <character name>... Use your map to travel there quickly.
Accept: "I'm on my way." ... Decline: "I need to rest, first." ... Ask: "You are ready to become an Assassin..."

dialog_steps.body_text_raw:
Headmaster Lee has told me great thing about you, <character name>. You have begun to learn the way of the Assassin, but to reach your full potential you must choose a second path.
Speak with the other headmasters and learn what they have to teach you. When you are ready to make a final choice, come and speak to me again.
dialog_steps.body_text_norm: headmaster lee has told me great thing about you, . you have begun to learn the way of the assassin, but to reach your full potential you must choose a second path. speak with the other headmasters and learn what they have to teach you. when you are ready to make a final choice, come and speak to me again.

sources.evidence_quote: Headmaster Lee has told me great thing about you, <character name>... When you are ready to make a final choice, come and speak to me again.

dialog_steps.body_text_raw:
I imagine Jinzo spoke to you of duty and of balance. That is all well and good for him, but as for me, I do this for the thrill, the pleasure, and the gold. Look into your victim's eyes as your blades steal away his life, and you can take his power, his essence, into your own. I remember everyone I have ever killed. They have become part of me. They are my power. I will teach you to be a hunter: you the spider, the mark your prey.
Now, listen carefully: I have a paying job from some...associates of mine. If you make the kill, I will split the profits with you. Headmaster Lee would not approve, but never mind that. Speak with me when you are ready to accept the task and learn new skills; we will head to the village to finish this job afterward.
dialog_steps.body_text_norm: i imagine jinzo spoke to you of duty and of balance. that is all well and good for him, but as for me, i do this for the thrill, the pleasure, and the gold. look into your victim's eyes as your blades steal away his life, and you can take his power, his essence, into your own. i remember everyone i have ever killed. they have become part of me. they are my power. i will teach you to be a hunter: you the spider, the mark your prey. now, listen carefully: i have a paying job from some...associates of mine. if you make the kill, i will split the profits with you. headmaster lee would not approve, but never mind that. speak with me when you are ready to accept the task and learn new skills; we will head to the village to finish this job afterward.

choices.choice_text_raw: I am ready to test my skills!
choices.choice_text_norm: i am ready to test my skills!

choices.choice_text_raw: This sounds a little out of my league.
choices.choice_text_norm: this sounds a little out of my league.

choices.choice_text_raw: Your target is Swift Honorclaw. Keep his name in your mind and do not falter when the time comes.
choices.choice_text_norm: your target is swift honorclaw. keep his name in your mind and do not falter when the time comes.

dialog_steps.body_text_raw:
Are you finally ready? We will be lucky if our target has not died of old age by now.... Come then, we need to get moving.
This way! Your target is just ahead.
Headmaster Lee would forbid you from performing any real work while still a student at the monastery, though this is a part of what it means to be an Assassin. This is our little secret.
My employer in this matter assures me that our target has committed a crime, though I do not ask excessive questions.
There he is! Quickly!
dialog_steps.body_text_norm: are you finally ready? we will be lucky if our target has not died of old age by now.... come then, we need to get moving. this way! your target is just ahead. headmaster lee would forbid you from performing any real work while still a student at the monastery, though this is a part of what it means to be an assassin. this is our little secret. my employer in this matter assures me that our target has committed a crime, though i do not ask excessive questions. there he is! quickly!

dialog_steps.body_text_raw:
You did it. Do you feel his life running through your veins?
Here is your share of the gold. As I said before, I would appreciate your not mentioning the specifics of our lesson to Headmaster Lee. We do not want to be on the sharp side of her steel. There were no witnesses to our actions, so if word gets back to either Headmaster Lee or the Tengu I'll know how it happened. I hope we have an understanding.
dialog_steps.body_text_norm: you did it. do you feel his life running through your veins? here is your share of the gold. as i said before, i would appreciate your not mentioning the specifics of our lesson to headmaster lee. we do not want to be on the sharp side of her steel. there were no witnesses to our actions, so if word gets back to either headmaster lee or the tengu i'll know how it happened. i hope we have an understanding.

sources.evidence_quote: I imagine Jinzo spoke to you of duty and of balance... Speak with me when you are ready to accept the task and learn new skills; we will head to the village to finish this job afterward.
Are you finally ready? We will be lucky if our target has not died of old age by now....
You did it. Do you feel his life running through your veins?... I hope we have an understanding.

dialog_steps.body_text_raw:
Now that you have chosen a secondary profession, I have a rare honor to bestow upon you. Every year I bring my most promising students to the minister for a formal introduction. This year I have selected you, along with Yijo here, for this honor.
If you accept my invitation, meet me in Sunqua Vale just outside the monastery gates, and we shall proceed to Minister Cho's Estate.
dialog_steps.body_text_norm: now that you have chosen a secondary profession, i have a rare honor to bestow upon you. every year i bring my most promising students to the minister for a formal introduction. this year i have selected you, along with yijo here, for this honor. if you accept my invitation, meet me in sunqua vale just outside the monastery gates, and we shall proceed to minister cho's estate.

choices.choice_text_raw: Of course I accept, Master Togo.
choices.choice_text_norm: of course i accept, master togo.

choices.choice_text_raw: I am unworthy of such an honor.
choices.choice_text_norm: i am unworthy of such an honor.

choices.choice_text_raw: Meet me in Sunqua Vale just outside the monastery gates.
choices.choice_text_norm: meet me in sunqua vale just outside the monastery gates.

dialog_steps.body_text_raw: Let us proceed to the estate; the minister is expecting us.
dialog_steps.body_text_norm: let us proceed to the estate; the minister is expecting us.

sources.evidence_quote: Now that you have chosen a secondary profession... If you accept my invitation, meet me in Sunqua Vale...
Let us proceed to the estate; the minister is expecting us.

dialog_steps.body_text_raw: Seems you are the new bunch of students Master Togo has been training. Most promising indeed! No doubt my son will be trained at the monastery when he comes of age. I will need to speak with Master Togo before I can let you in.
dialog_steps.body_text_norm: seems you are the new bunch of students master togo has been training. most promising indeed! no doubt my son will be trained at the monastery when he comes of age. i will need to speak with master togo before i can let you in.

choices.choice_text_raw: I am honored to be here.
choices.choice_text_norm: i am honored to be here.

choices.choice_text_raw: Let's go! We were trained by the best!
choices.choice_text_norm: let's go! we were trained by the best!

choices.choice_text_raw: Yes.
choices.choice_text_norm: yes.

choices.choice_text_raw: No.
choices.choice_text_norm: no.

choices.choice_text_raw: I think I need more training.
choices.choice_text_norm: i think i need more training.

sources.evidence_quote: Seems you are the new bunch of students... I will need to speak with Master Togo before I can let you in.
[Yes] I am honored to be here. ... [Yes] Let's go! We were trained by the best! ... [Yes] Yes. ... [No] No. ... [No] I think I need more training.

dialog_steps.body_text_raw: I am at a complete loss as to what is happening! It appears that the guards on staff just suddenly went mad. They are either fighting each other or fighting the animals that have been afflicted. The few who managed to keep their wits say they saw a dark form appear and disappear, but none could give me more information than that. We desperately need Togo's help in this situation. It really is a shame you students had to be involved in this mess.
dialog_steps.body_text_norm: i am at a complete loss as to what is happening! it appears that the guards on staff just suddenly went mad. they are either fighting each other or fighting the animals that have been afflicted. the few who managed to keep their wits say they saw a dark form appear and disappear, but none could give me more information than that. we desperately need togo's help in this situation. it really is a shame you students had to be involved in this mess.

sources.evidence_quote: I am at a complete loss as to what is happening!... It really is a shame you students had to be involved in this mess.

dialog_steps.body_text_raw: You must be <character name>. Master Togo has already left along with a few of the headmasters and some of the monastery's other promising students. He hopes to find more explanation about the plague in Kaineng City. When you are ready to leave for the mainland, talk to me and I shall help transport you there. Once you arrive on the Kaineng Docks, seek out Headmaster Greico for further instructions.
dialog_steps.body_text_norm: you must be . master togo has already left along with a few of the headmasters and some of the monastery's other promising students. he hopes to find more explanation about the plague in kaineng city. when you are ready to leave for the mainland, talk to me and i shall help transport you there. once you arrive on the kaineng docks, seek out headmaster greico for further instructions.

choices.choice_text_raw: I will set sail immediately.
choices.choice_text_norm: i will set sail immediately.

choices.choice_text_raw: I have other obligations I must attend to.
choices.choice_text_norm: i have other obligations i must attend to.

choices.choice_text_raw: Headmaster Greico waits for you at the Kaineng Docks. You should hurry; the plague spreads with every second you linger here.
choices.choice_text_norm: headmaster greico waits for you at the kaineng docks. you should hurry; the plague spreads with every second you linger here.

sources.evidence_quote: You must be <character name>. Master Togo has already left... Once you arrive on the Kaineng Docks, seek out Headmaster Greico for further instructions.
Accept: "I will set sail immediately." ... Decline: "I have other obligations I must attend to." ... Ask: "Headmaster Greico waits for you at the Kaineng Docks..."

dialog_steps.body_text_raw: Greetings, <character name>. I trust your trip was uneventful. Master Togo would like you to meet him in Wajjun Bazaar. He asked that you make haste.
dialog_steps.body_text_norm: greetings, . i trust your trip was uneventful. master togo would like you to meet him in wajjun bazaar. he asked that you make haste.

dialog_steps.body_text_raw: It is never easy to tell a mother that her child is dead.... It was good of you to accompany Master Togo and to offer your condolences to Jia. Yijo would have wanted that. While you were helping Master Togo, some of the other professors arrived. They headed off toward the Wajjun Bazaar.
dialog_steps.body_text_norm: it is never easy to tell a mother that her child is dead.... it was good of you to accompany master togo and to offer your condolences to jia. yijo would have wanted that. while you were helping master togo, some of the other professors arrived. they headed off toward the wajjun bazaar.

sources.evidence_quote: Greetings, <character name>. I trust your trip was uneventful. Master Togo would like you to meet him in Wajjun Bazaar. He asked that you make haste.

It is never easy to tell a mother that her child is dead.... It was good of you to accompany Master Togo and to offer your condolences to Jia. Yijo would have wanted that. While you were helping Master Togo, some of the other professors arrived. They headed off toward the Wajjun Bazaar.

dialog_steps.body_text_raw: Ah, good...you have come to join us. I fear we will need all the assistance we can get to stop this plague. First, however, you and I have another important task we must attend to. Yijo's mother has a shop here, and as Master of Shing Jea Monastery, it is my duty to inform her of what happened to her son. You and Yijo trained closely together, and you were there when he died. Perhaps if she knows that he died with honor, she will find some consolation...however small.
dialog_steps.body_text_norm: ah, good...you have come to join us. i fear we will need all the assistance we can get to stop this plague. first, however, you and i have another important task we must attend to. yijo's mother has a shop here, and as master of shing jea monastery, it is my duty to inform her of what happened to her son. you and yijo trained closely together, and you were there when he died. perhaps if she knows that he died with honor, she will find some consolation...however small.

dialog_steps.body_text_raw: Do not worry about Jia, <character name>. She is strong of heart, just like her son. Now, please hurry back to Kaineng Docks and Headmaster Greico to see if any more help has arrived. I am going to speak with the emperor.
dialog_steps.body_text_norm: do not worry about jia, . she is strong of heart, just like her son. now, please hurry back to kaineng docks and headmaster greico to see if any more help has arrived. i am going to speak with the emperor.

sources.evidence_quote: Ah, good...you have come to join us. I fear we will need all the assistance we can get to stop this plague. First, however, you and I have another important task we must attend to. Yijo's mother has a shop here, and as Master of Shing Jea Monastery, it is my duty to inform her of what happened to her son.
Do not worry about Jia, <character name>. She is strong of heart, just like her son. Now, please hurry back to Kaineng Docks and Headmaster Greico to see if any more help has arrived.

dialog_steps.body_text_raw: Master Togo... Kei na Kai! Your presence here with a student other than my son can mean only one thing.... But I knew this...even before you came I knew that my son was dead. I have heard of the plague reaching the monastery, and I dreamt of my son's passing many times in the last few days. Your presence here only confirms my dreams.... I am glad that Yijo did not have to see what has become of us here...how badly the plague has affected us. I pray only that he died with honor. Now, please leave me to grieve.
dialog_steps.body_text_norm: master togo... kei na kai! your presence here with a student other than my son can mean only one thing.... but i knew this...even before you came i knew that my son was dead. i have heard of the plague reaching the monastery, and i dreamt of my son's passing many times in the last few days. your presence here only confirms my dreams.... i am glad that yijo did not have to see what has become of us here...how badly the plague has affected us. i pray only that he died with honor. now, please leave me to grieve.

sources.evidence_quote: Master Togo... Kei na Kai! Your presence here with a student other than my son can mean only one thing.... But I knew this... I am glad that Yijo did not have to see what has become of us here...how badly the plague has affected us. I pray only that he died with honor. Now, please leave me to grieve.

dialog_steps.body_text_raw: Within the monastery we are safe, but in order to survive outside these walls, you must learn to defend yourself. In this training exercise, you will be attacked by two of our instructors: Weng Gha and Jinzo. I will provide you with defensive skills; use them to survive their attacks for two full minutes. By accepting this quest you will abandon other advanced training quests and put yourself into a separate training arena from the rest of your party, if applicable.
dialog_steps.body_text_norm: within the monastery we are safe, but in order to survive outside these walls, you must learn to defend yourself. in this training exercise, you will be attacked by two of our instructors: weng gha and jinzo. i will provide you with defensive skills; use them to survive their attacks for two full minutes. by accepting this quest you will abandon other advanced training quests and put yourself into a separate training arena from the rest of your party, if applicable.

choices.choice_text_raw: Sounds straightforward enough.
choices.choice_text_norm: sounds straightforward enough.

choices.choice_text_raw: I'm not sure I can survive for two minutes.
choices.choice_text_norm: i'm not sure i can survive for two minutes.

choices.choice_text_raw: There are many different defenses available to you. Go and show off your skills to Weng Gha and Jinzo in the Dojo.
choices.choice_text_norm: there are many different defenses available to you. go and show off your skills to weng gha and jinzo in the dojo.

dialog_steps.body_text_raw: Well done. You have mastered the art of defense. This skill is especially useful when battling opponents, such as Warriors, who use melee attacks.
dialog_steps.body_text_norm: well done. you have mastered the art of defense. this skill is especially useful when battling opponents, such as warriors, who use melee attacks.

sources.evidence_quote: Within the monastery we are safe... use them to survive their attacks for two full minutes. Accept: "Sounds straightforward enough." Decline: "I'm not sure I can survive for two minutes." Ask: "There are many different defenses available to you..."
Well done. You have mastered the art of defense. This skill is especially useful when battling opponents, such as Warriors, who use melee attacks.

dialog_steps.body_text_raw: <Character Name>, I am so glad you are here! I have just learned that live rabbits are being used as bait by a hunter who wishes to capture a Yeti. As if this were not horrible enough, it seems that the scent of the rabbits is attracting all sorts of other creatures, which are attacking travelers on the road nearby. I need you to help me free the rabbits before they or anyone else gets hurt!
dialog_steps.body_text_norm: , i am so glad you are here! i have just learned that live rabbits are being used as bait by a hunter who wishes to capture a yeti. as if this were not horrible enough, it seems that the scent of the rabbits is attracting all sorts of other creatures, which are attacking travelers on the road nearby. i need you to help me free the rabbits before they or anyone else gets hurt!

choices.choice_text_raw: Of course I will help!
choices.choice_text_norm: of course i will help!

choices.choice_text_raw: This sounds like an important task. I must prepare, first.
choices.choice_text_norm: this sounds like an important task. i must prepare, first.

choices.choice_text_raw: Hurry! We have to free those poor rabbits before they get eaten! Oh, and the road is unsafe for travelers....
choices.choice_text_norm: hurry! we have to free those poor rabbits before they get eaten! oh, and the road is unsafe for travelers....

dialog_steps.body_text_raw: There you go, little fellow! Imagine how frightened he must have been! Terrible, using these creatures as live bait....
dialog_steps.body_text_norm: there you go, little fellow! imagine how frightened he must have been! terrible, using these creatures as live bait....

dialog_steps.body_text_raw: Two rabbits freed, one left. It feels good to do good works, does it not? Wait...do you smell that? I think something has caught the rabbits' scent and is coming in for a closer look. Get ready for a fight!
dialog_steps.body_text_norm: two rabbits freed, one left. it feels good to do good works, does it not? wait...do you smell that? i think something has caught the rabbits' scent and is coming in for a closer look. get ready for a fight!

dialog_steps.body_text_raw: Ugly little critter, but I suppose everything has its place in this world, somewhere. We had better go and free that last rabbit before another of those things comes for it.
dialog_steps.body_text_norm: ugly little critter, but i suppose everything has its place in this world, somewhere. we had better go and free that last rabbit before another of those things comes for it.

dialog_steps.body_text_raw: We have done it! All of the rabbits have been freed. I feel warm and fuzzy inside.
dialog_steps.body_text_norm: we have done it! all of the rabbits have been freed. i feel warm and fuzzy inside.

dialog_steps.body_text_raw: Well, that was a day's work well done. You should feel very proud of yourself, <Character Name>. You are a true hero.
dialog_steps.body_text_norm: well, that was a day's work well done. you should feel very proud of yourself, . you are a true hero.

sources.evidence_quote: <Character Name>, I am so glad you are here! ... I need you to help me free the rabbits before they or anyone else gets hurt! Accept: "Of course I will help!" Decline: "This sounds like an important task. I must prepare, first." Ask: "Hurry! We have to free those poor rabbits before they get eaten!"

There you go, little fellow!... Ugly little critter, but I suppose everything has its place in this world... We have done it! All of the rabbits have been freed... Well, that was a day's work well done. You should feel very proud of yourself, <Character Name>. You are a true hero.

dialog_steps.body_text_raw: Master Togo has gone to the palace to see if the emperor has any useful information about the plague. As I am sure you know, the emperor and Master Togo are brothers...Master Togo's mother caught the eye of Emperor Kintah, our current emperor's father. Not many are allowed into the emperor's palace, but he permits Master Togo entry because of their shared blood. While we wait, I have a task for you. I sent some of the other monastery students out into Wajjun Bazaar to speak with the locals to gather information about this plague. I'd appreciate it if you could find out what they have learned and then report your information to Master Togo. The information may prove invaluable in determining the source of the plague.
dialog_steps.body_text_norm: master togo has gone to the palace to see if the emperor has any useful information about the plague. as i am sure you know, the emperor and master togo are brothers...master togo's mother caught the eye of emperor kintah, our current emperor's father. not many are allowed into the emperor's palace, but he permits master togo entry because of their shared blood. while we wait, i have a task for you. i sent some of the other monastery students out into wajjun bazaar to speak with the locals to gather information about this plague. i'd appreciate it if you could find out what they have learned and then report your information to master togo. the information may prove invaluable in determining the source of the plague.

choices.choice_text_raw: I'll go find out what I can.
choices.choice_text_norm: i'll go find out what i can.

choices.choice_text_raw: I'd rather stay here with you on the docks.
choices.choice_text_norm: i'd rather stay here with you on the docks.

choices.choice_text_raw: Lo Sha and the other headmasters and students are in the Bazaar gathering what information they can about the plague. I'm certain they could use your help.
choices.choice_text_norm: lo sha and the other headmasters and students are in the bazaar gathering what information they can about the plague. i'm certain they could use your help.

sources.evidence_quote: Master Togo has gone to the palace to see if the emperor has any useful information about the plague... I'd appreciate it if you could find out what they have learned and then report your information to Master Togo.

Accept: "I'll go find out what I can." Decline: "I'd rather stay here with you on the docks." Ask: "Lo Sha and the other headmasters... are in the Bazaar gathering what information they can about the plague."
